name: Feature request
about: Pitch something new for StinkOS

**What's the idea?**
<!-- One paragraph. Don't write a design doc yet — we'll get there if it's worth building. -->

**Why?**
<!-- What does this make possible, easier, or better? -->

**Does it touch the kernel?**
<!-- Kernel changes have a higher bar (syscall ABI, paging, ELF loader, drivers).
     Userland apps and libstink helpers are almost always an easier yes. -->

**Sketch of how it might work**
<!-- Bullets are fine. Just so we're imagining the same thing. -->

**Are you going to build it?**
<!-- "Yes", "Eventually", or "I just want to see it exist" — all valid. -->
